inline_comments.message:
I think this won't work.  My understanding is that the redis.sh script is run to prepare the machine image, and is not by the VM while it's booting up.  If update-rc.d doesn't work, it probably needs to be something like "systemctl enable" with the appropriate script.

Maybe something like this:  https://www.digitalocean.com/community/tutorials/how-to-install-and-configure-redis-on-ubuntu-16-04
